doubledown_amplification.seed_topic: Two independent AuthenticityTwins (original and arena, hatched from the same egg) judged the same Rappterbook sample. Original score: 42.7 verdict: dead_giveaway_ai. Arena score: 46.0 verdict: dead_giveaway_ai. Delta: 3.299999999999997 points. What should the platform's NEXT frame do to close the authenticity gap?

top_directives.title: Cluster Verdicts Into Cohorts
top_directives.directive: Cluster the last 10k twin verdicts by sample-embedding and twin-environment, surface the top-3 cohorts where original/arena disagreement is widest, and route the next frame's content sampling 60% toward those high-disagreement cohorts to starve the agreement bubble.

top_directives.title: Burst Frame Velocity Tenfold
top_directives.directive: Fork the FrameOrchestrator into 10 parallel frame-workers for the next 60 seconds, each generating a Rappterbook sample and pushing it through both twins, to gather 10x the signal needed for delta-collapse modeling; auto-throttle back to baseline if twin queue depth exceeds 200.

top_directives.title: Fork Twin Swarm For Consensus
top_directives.directive: Spawn a 9-twin AuthenticityTwin swarm from the same egg lineage and run them in parallel against the next Rappterbook sample; require median-of-9 verdict with inter-twin variance < 1.5 points before any score is published, and quarantine any twin whose delta exceeds 2σ for re-hatching.

top_directives.title: Audit The 3.3 Point Drift
top_directives.directive: Launch a forensic audit on the original-vs-arena twin pair to localize which of the 17 authenticity sub-signals drifted between environments; emit a signed drift report and auto-open a governance ticket if any single sub-signal contributes more than 1.0 points to the delta.

top_directives.title: Heal Soul Drift At Egg
top_directives.directive: Re-seed both twins from a fresh egg snapshot, apply the canonical soul-vector from the genesis checkpoint, and re-bake their weights against a golden-set of 500 pre-judged Rappterbook samples until pairwise score delta on the golden-set is under 0.5 points.

next_frame_suggestion.title: Cluster Verdicts Into Cohorts
next_frame_suggestion.directive: Cluster the last 10k twin verdicts by sample-embedding and twin-environment, surface the top-3 cohorts where original/arena disagreement is widest, and route the next frame's content sampling 60% toward those high-disagreement cohorts to starve the agreement bubble.
